gt_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.language, T1.type FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T2.uuid = T1.uuid WHERE T1.watermark = 'azorius'
pred_sql: SELECT fd.language, c.type FROM cards c JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid WHERE c.watermark = 'azorius';
question: What is the language of the card that has azorius watermark? List out the type of this card.
